compare any 5 bricks by internal sales v:
SELECT 
  "b"."name" AS "Brick Name", 
  SUM(CAST("id"."product_quantity" AS numeric)) AS "Internal Units", 
  SUM("ims"."unit") AS "IMS Market Units"
FROM "ims_brick" AS "b"
JOIN "ims_sale" AS "ims" ON "b"."id" = "ims"."brickId"
LEFT JOIN "customer_details" AS "cd" ON "b"."id" = "cd"."ims_brick_id"
LEFT JOIN "invoice" AS "inv" ON "cd"."customer_id" = "inv"."cust_id"
LEFT JOIN "invoice_details" AS "id" ON "inv"."id" = "id"."invoice_id"
GROUP BY "b"."name"
LIMIT 5;
which 3 products have the highest invoic:
SELECT 
  p."name", 
  SUM(CAST(id."product_quantity" AS numeric)) AS "Total Quantity"
FROM 
  "invoice_details" id
JOIN 
  "products" p ON id."product_id" = p."id"
GROUP BY 
  p."name"
ORDER BY 
  "Total Quantity" DESC
LIMIT 10;
by revenue, not quantity?:
SELECT 
  b."name" AS "Brick Name", 
  SUM(ims."price") AS "IMS Market Revenue"
FROM "ims_brick" AS b
JOIN "ims_sale" AS ims ON b."id" = ims."brickId"
GROUP BY b."name"
ORDER BY "IMS Market Revenue" DESC
LIMIT 10;
what is the roi for each manager in the:
SELECT 
  "m"."name" AS "Manager Name", 
  SUM("r"."sales") AS "Sales Generated", 
  SUM("r"."invest_amount") AS "Investment Amount",
  (SUM("r"."sales") - SUM("r"."invest_amount")) / SUM("r"."invest_amount") AS "ROI"
FROM "managers" AS "m"
JOIN "doctor_plan" AS "dp" ON "m"."id" = "dp"."managerId"
JOIN "roi" AS "r" ON "dp"."doctorId" = "r"."doctor_id" AND "dp"."healthCentreId" = "r"."healthcentre_id" AND "m"."id" = "r"."manager_id"
WHERE EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM "r"."start_date") = EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "r"."start_date") = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY "m"."name"
ORDER BY "ROI" DESC
LIMIT 10;
how many active managers are there in ea:
SELECT 
  z."name" AS "Zone Name", 
  COUNT(DISTINCT m."id") AS "Number of Active Managers",
  AVG(dp_plans.count) AS "Average Planned Visits for HVD"
FROM 
  "managers" m
  JOIN "zone_managers" zm ON m."id" = zm."manager_id"
  JOIN "zones" z ON zm."zone_id" = z."id"
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
      dp."managerId", 
      COUNT(dp."id") AS count
    FROM 
      "doctor_plan" dp
      JOIN "doctors" d ON dp."doctorId" = d."id"
    WHERE 
      dp."date" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) 
      AND d."category" = 'A' 
      OR dp."date" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) 
      AND d."id" IN (
        SELECT 
          "doctorId" 
        FROM 
          "doctor_plan" 
        WHERE 
          "date" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) 
        GROUP BY 
          "doctorId" 
        HAVING 
          COUNT("id") > 3
      )
    GROUP BY 
      dp."managerId"
  ) dp_plans ON m."id" = dp_plans."managerId"
WHERE 
  m."id" IN (
    SELECT 
      "managerId" 
    FROM 
      "doctor_plan" 
    WHERE 
      "date" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) 
    GROUP BY 
      "managerId" 
    HAVING 
      COUNT("id") >= 5
  )
GROUP BY 
  z."name"
LIMIT 10;
what is the market share of karachi bric:
SELECT 
  b."name" AS "Brick Name", 
  SUM(CAST(od."product_quantity" AS numeric)) AS "Internal Units", 
  SUM(ims."unit") AS "IMS Market Units",
  ROUND(
    CASE 
      WHEN SUM(ims."unit") > 0 THEN (SUM(CAST(od."product_quantity" AS numeric)) / SUM(ims."unit")) * 100
      ELSE 0 
    END, 2
  ) AS "Market Share (%)"
FROM "ims_brick" AS b
JOIN "ims_sale" AS ims ON b."id" = ims."brickId"
LEFT JOIN "customer_details" AS cd ON b."id" = cd."ims_brick_id"
LEFT JOIN "orders" AS o ON cd."customer_id" = o."customer_id"
LEFT JOIN "order_details" AS od ON o."id" = od."order_id"
WHERE b."name" = 'Karachi'
GROUP BY b."name"
LIMIT 10;
compare top 5 bricks by internal units v:
SELECT 
  b."name" AS "Brick Name",
  SUM(CAST(ivd."product_quantity" AS NUMERIC)) AS "Internal Units",
  SUM(ims."unit") AS "IMS Market Units"
FROM "ims_brick" AS b
LEFT JOIN "ims_sale" AS ims ON b."id" = ims."brickId"
LEFT JOIN "customer_details" AS cd ON b."id" = cd."ims_brick_id"
LEFT JOIN "customers" AS c ON cd."customer_id" = c."id"
LEFT JOIN "invoice" AS i ON c."id" = i."cust_id"
LEFT JOIN "invoice_details" AS ivd ON i."id" = ivd."invoice_id"
GROUP BY b."name"
ORDER BY "Internal Units" DESC
LIMIT 10;
compare market units of 'product a' vs ':
SELECT 
  b."name" AS "Brick Name",
  SUM(ims."unit") AS "Product A Market Units",
  NULL AS "Product B Market Units"
FROM "ims_brick" AS b
JOIN "ims_sale" AS ims ON b."id" = ims."brickId"
JOIN "products" AS p ON ims."product_id" = p."id"
WHERE p."name" = 'Product A'
GROUP BY b."name"
LIMIT 10;
show internal sales trend for f.b.area r:
SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC('month', i.invoice_date) AS "Month",
  SUM(COALESCE(idetails.product_quantity, 0)) AS "Total Units"
FROM regions r
JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT customer_id, region_id FROM customer_details) cd ON r.id = cd.region_id
JOIN customers c ON cd.customer_id = c.id
JOIN invoice i ON c.id = i.cust_id
JOIN invoice_details idetails ON i.id = idetails.invoice_id
WHERE LOWER(r.name) = LOWER('F.B.AREA') AND i.invoice_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', i.invoice_date)
ORDER BY "Month"
LIMIT 10;

which bricks have more than 50% market s:
SELECT 
  "b"."name" AS "Brick Name", 
  SUM(CAST("id"."product_quantity" AS numeric)) / SUM("ims"."unit") AS "Market Share"
FROM 
  "ims_brick" AS "b"
JOIN 
  "customer_details" AS "cd" ON "b"."id" = "cd"."ims_brick_id"
JOIN 
  "invoice" AS "inv" ON "cd"."customer_id" = "inv"."cust_id"
JOIN 
  "invoice_details" AS "id" ON "inv"."id" = "id"."invoice_id"
JOIN 
  "ims_sale" AS "ims" ON "b"."id" = "ims"."brickId"
GROUP BY 
  "b"."name"
HAVING 
  SUM(CAST("id"."product_quantity" AS numeric)) / SUM("ims"."unit") > 0.5
LIMIT 10;

\"show me the top 5 doctors from 'catego:
SELECT 
  "d"."name" AS "Doctor Name", 
  "b"."name" AS "Brick Name", 
  SUM("ims"."unit") AS "Market Sales"
FROM 
  "doctors" AS "d"
JOIN 
  "doctor_plan" AS "dp" ON "d"."id" = "dp"."doctorId"
JOIN 
  "healthcentres" AS "hc" ON "dp"."healthCentreId" = "hc"."id"
JOIN 
  "ims_brick" AS "b" ON "hc"."ims_brick_id" = "b"."id"
JOIN 
  "ims_sale" AS "ims" ON "b"."id" = "ims"."brickId"
WHERE 
  "d"."category" = 'A' 
  AND "dp"."status" = 'PENDING' 
  AND "dp"."visited_date" IS NULL 
  AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "dp"."date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 
  "d"."name", "b"."name"
ORDER BY 
  SUM("ims"."unit") DESC
LIMIT 5;
compare internal units vs ims market uni:
SELECT 
  b."name" AS "Brick Name", 
  SUM(CAST(id."product_quantity" AS numeric)) AS "Internal Units", 
  SUM(ims."unit") AS "IMS Market Units",
  SUM(ims."unit") - SUM(CAST(id."product_quantity" AS numeric)) AS "Unit Difference"
FROM "ims_brick" AS b
JOIN "ims_sale" AS ims ON b."id" = ims."brickId"
LEFT JOIN "customer_details" AS cd ON b."id" = cd."ims_brick_id"
LEFT JOIN "invoice" AS i ON cd."customer_id" = i."cust_id"
LEFT JOIN "invoice_details" AS id ON i."id" = id."invoice_id"
GROUP BY b."name"
ORDER BY SUM(ims."unit") DESC
LIMIT 10;

compare internal sales vs market sales i:
WITH Internal AS (
  SELECT ib."name", SUM(ms."product_quantity") as "qty" 
  FROM "master_sale" ms 
  JOIN "customer_details" cd ON ms."customer_id" = cd."customer_id" 
  JOIN "ims_brick" ib ON cd."ims_brick_id" = ib."id" 
  WHERE ib."name" ILIKE '%F.B.AREA%' 
  GROUP BY ib."name"
),
Market AS (
  SELECT ib."name", SUM(s."unit") as "qty" 
  FROM "ims_sale" s 
  JOIN "ims_brick" ib ON s."brickId" = ib."id" 
  WHERE ib."name" ILIKE '%F.B.AREA%' 
  GROUP BY ib."name"
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(i."name", m."name") AS "Brick Name", 
  COALESCE(i."qty", 0) AS "Internal Units", 
  COALESCE(m."qty", 0) AS "Market Units"
FROM Internal i 
FULL OUTER JOIN Market m ON i."name" = m."name"
LIMIT 10;
\"why the big difference?\":
WITH Internal AS (
  SELECT ib."name", SUM(ms."product_quantity") as qty 
  FROM "master_sale" ms 
  JOIN "customer_details" cd ON ms."customer_id" = cd."customer_id" 
  JOIN "ims_brick" ib ON cd."ims_brick_id" = ib."id" 
  GROUP BY 1
),
Market AS (
  SELECT ib."name", SUM(s."unit") as qty 
  FROM "ims_sale" s 
  JOIN "ims_brick" ib ON s."brickId" = ib."id" 
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(i."name", m."name") AS "Brick Name", 
  COALESCE(i.qty, 0) AS "Internal Units", 
  COALESCE(m.qty, 0) AS "IMS Market Units",
  ABS(COALESCE(i.qty, 0) - COALESCE(m.qty, 0)) AS "Difference"
FROM Internal i 
FULL OUTER JOIN Market m ON i."name" = m."name"
ORDER BY "Difference" DESC
LIMIT 10;

isme hm asa kiya kr skte hn jis se diffe:
WITH Internal AS (
  SELECT ib."name", SUM(ms."product_quantity") as internal_qty 
  FROM "master_sale" ms 
  JOIN "customer_details" cd ON ms."customer_id" = cd."customer_id" 
  JOIN "ims_brick" ib ON cd."ims_brick_id" = ib."id" 
  GROUP BY ib."name"
),
Market AS (
  SELECT ib."name", SUM(s."unit") as market_qty 
  FROM "ims_sale" s 
  JOIN "ims_brick" ib ON s."brickId" = ib."id" 
  GROUP BY ib."name"
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(i."name", m."name") AS "Brick Name", 
  COALESCE(i.internal_qty, 0) AS "Internal Units", 
  COALESCE(m.market_qty, 0) AS "Market Units",
  COALESCE(m.market_qty, 0) - COALESCE(i.internal_qty, 0) AS "Difference"
FROM Internal i 
FULL OUTER JOIN Market m ON i."name" = m."name"
ORDER BY "Difference" DESC
LIMIT 10;

  t.name, 
  SUM(ts.sale_target) AS total_sales_target
FROM 
  territories t
JOIN

which product group generated the highes:
SELECT 
  pg.group, 
  SUM(ms.total_amount) as revenue
FROM 
  master_sale ms
JOIN 
  products p ON ms.product_name = p.name
JOIN 
  product_groups pg ON p.product_group_id = pg.id
GROUP BY 
  pg.group
ORDER BY 
  revenue DESC
LIMIT 3;

  dp.status
FROM 
  doctor_plan dp

  dp.date >= '2025-01-01' AND dp.date < '2026-01-01';

isko ims market sales sa compare kro:
WITH Internal AS (
  SELECT ib.name, SUM(ms.product_quantity) as qty 
  FROM master_sale ms 
  JOIN customer_details cd ON ms.customer_id = cd.customer_id 
  JOIN ims_brick ib ON cd.ims_brick_id = ib.id 
  WHERE ib.name ILIKE '%F.B.AREA BLOCK-3%' 
  GROUP BY 1
),
Market AS (
  SELECT ib.name, SUM(s.unit) as qty 
  FROM ims_sale s 
  JOIN ims_brick ib ON s."brickId" = ib.id 
  WHERE ib.name ILIKE '%F.B.AREA BLOCK-3%' 
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(i.name, m.name) AS "Brick Name", 
  COALESCE(i.qty, 0) AS "Internal Units", 
  COALESCE(m.qty, 0) AS "IMS Market Units"
FROM Internal i 
FULL OUTER JOIN Market m ON i.name = m.name
ORDER BY "Internal Units" DESC;
which team has the highest target vs ach:
WITH Team_Targets AS (
  SELECT 
    t.id,
    t.name,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM tg.month) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN tg.quantity_target ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "Total Target",
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM tg.month) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN tg.sale_target ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "Total Achievement"
  FROM teams t
  LEFT JOIN targets tg ON t.id = tg.team_id
  GROUP BY t.id, t.name
)
SELECT 
  name, 
  "Total Target", 
  "Total Achievement"
FROM Team_Targets
ORDER BY "Total Target" - "Total Achievement" DESC
LIMIT 1;
karachi ke un top 5 doctors ke locations:
SELECT 
  dr."name", 
  sp."name" AS "Specialization", 
  hc."latitude" AS "Latitude", 
  hc."longitude" AS "Longitude"
FROM "doctors" AS dr
JOIN "_doctorsTospecializatons" AS dts ON dr."id" = dts."A"
JOIN "specializatons" AS sp ON dts."B" = sp."id"
JOIN "_doctorsTohealthcentres" AS dthc ON dr."id" = dthc."A"
JOIN "healthcentres" AS hc ON dthc."B" = hc."id"
WHERE sp."name" ILIKE '%CARDIOLOGIST%' 
  AND hc."city_id" IN (
    SELECT "id" FROM "city" WHERE "name" ILIKE '%KARACHI%'
  )
ORDER BY dr."name" ASC
LIMIT 5;
agar main 'zaid bin saeed' manager ke vi:
WITH CurrentVisits AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(dp."id") AS "Current Visits"
  FROM 
    "doctor_plan" dp
  WHERE 
    dp."managerId" = (SELECT id FROM managers WHERE name ILIKE '%ZAID BIN SAEED%')
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM dp."date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM dp."date") = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
),
CurrentSales AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(ms."total_amount") AS "Current Sales"
  FROM 
    "master_sale" ms
  JOIN 
    "customer_details" cd ON ms."customer_id" = cd."customer_id"
  JOIN 
    "ims_brick" ib ON cd."ims_brick_id" = ib."id"
  WHERE 
    ib."name" IN (
      SELECT 
        ib."name" 
      FROM 
        "customer_details" cd
      JOIN 
        "ims_brick" ib ON cd."ims_brick_id" = ib."id"
      JOIN 
        "managers" m ON cd."distributor_id" = m."company_id"
      WHERE 
        m."name" ILIKE '%ZAID BIN SAEED%'
    )
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ms."invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ms."invoice_date") = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')
),
ProjectedVisits AS (
  SELECT 
    (SELECT "Current Visits" FROM CurrentVisits) * 2 AS "Projected Visits"
),
ProjectedSales AS (
  SELECT 
    (SELECT "Current Sales" FROM CurrentSales) * 2 AS "Projected Sales"
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT "Projected Sales" FROM ProjectedSales) - (SELECT "Current Sales" FROM CurrentSales) AS "Projected Sales Increase"
\"pichlay 6 maheenay ki monthly internal:
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
  SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM 
  master_sale
WHERE 
  invoice_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 month'
GROUP BY 
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date)
ORDER BY 
  month_number;
compare internal vs ims market sales for:
WITH Internal AS (
  SELECT ib.name, SUM(ms.product_quantity) as qty 
  FROM master_sale ms 
  JOIN customer_details cd ON ms.customer_id = cd.customer_id 
  JOIN ims_brick ib ON cd.ims_brick_id = ib.id 
  WHERE ib.name ILIKE '%GULSHAN%' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ms.invoice_date) = 2025
  GROUP BY ib.name
),
Market AS (
  SELECT ib.name, SUM(s.unit) as qty 
  FROM ims_sale s 
  JOIN ims_brick ib ON s."brickId" = ib.id 
  WHERE ib.name ILIKE '%GULSHAN%' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.invoice_date) = 2025
  GROUP BY ib.name
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(i.name, m.name) AS "Brick Name", 
  COALESCE(i.qty, 0) AS "Internal Units", 
  COALESCE(m.qty, 0) AS "IMS Market Units"
FROM Internal i 
FULL OUTER JOIN Market m ON i.name = m.name
ORDER BY "Internal Units" DESC
LIMIT 5;

pichlay saal (2025) ki top 5 best-perfor:
WITH MonthlySales AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
    product_name,
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
  FROM master_sale
  WHERE year_number = 2025
  GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date), product_name
),
Top5Products AS (
  SELECT 
    product_name,
    SUM(total_revenue) AS yearly_revenue
  FROM MonthlySales
  GROUP BY product_name
  ORDER BY yearly_revenue DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT 
  ms.product_name,
  ms.month_number,
  ms.total_revenue
FROM MonthlySales ms
JOIN Top5Products t5 ON ms.product_name = t5.product_name
ORDER BY ms.product_name, ms.month_number;
pichlay saal (2025) ki top 3 best-perfor:
WITH MonthlySales AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
    product_name,
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
  FROM master_sale
  WHERE year_number = 2025
  GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date), product_name
),
Top3Products AS (
  SELECT 
    product_name,
    SUM(total_revenue) AS yearly_revenue
  FROM MonthlySales
  GROUP BY product_name
  ORDER BY yearly_revenue DESC
  LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
  ms.product_name,
  ms.month_number,
  ms.total_revenue
FROM MonthlySales ms
JOIN Top3Products t3 ON ms.product_name = t3.product_name
ORDER BY ms.product_name, ms.month_number;
last year ke product 1 dikhao monthly tr:
WITH MonthlySales AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
    product_name,
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
  FROM master_sale
  WHERE year_number = 2025
  GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date), product_name
),
TopProduct AS (
  SELECT 
    product_name,
    SUM(total_revenue) AS yearly_revenue
  FROM MonthlySales
  GROUP BY product_name
  ORDER BY yearly_revenue DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  ms.product_name,
  ms.month_number,
  ms.total_revenue
FROM MonthlySales ms
JOIN TopProduct tp ON ms.product_name = tp.product_name
ORDER BY ms.month_number;
agr main haider ali manager ke visits 2:
WITH MonthlySales AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
    area_manager_name,
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(*) AS visit_count
  FROM master_sale
  WHERE area_manager_name ILIKE '%Haider Ali%' AND year_number = 2025
  GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date), area_manager_name
),
GrowthEstimate AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(total_revenue / visit_count) AS revenue_per_visit
  FROM MonthlySales
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT revenue_per_visit FROM GrowthEstimate) * 2 * (SELECT AVG(visit_count) FROM MonthlySales) AS estimated_revenue

SELECT 
  r.name AS "Region Manager Name", 
  SUM(ms.total_amount) AS "Total Annual Sales"
FROM 
  master_sale ms
  JOIN regions r ON ms.region_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', r.name, '%')
GROUP BY 
  r.name
ORDER BY 
  "Total Annual Sales" DESC

show me un area managers ki list jin ke:
WITH area_manager_visits AS (
  SELECT 
    "area_manager_name", 
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "previous_month_visits",
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "current_month_visits"
  FROM 
    "master_sale" 
  WHERE 
    "customer_type" = 'Doctors'
  GROUP BY 
    "area_manager_name"
),
area_manager_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    "area_manager_name", 
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1 THEN "total_amount" ELSE 0 END) AS "previous_month_sales",
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN "total_amount" ELSE 0 END) AS "current_month_sales"
  FROM 
    "master_sale" 
  WHERE 
    "customer_type" = 'Doctors'
  GROUP BY 
    "area_manager_name"
)
SELECT 
  amv."area_manager_name",
  amv."previous_month_visits",
  amv."current_month_visits",
  ams."previous_month_sales",
  ams."current_month_sales"
FROM 
  area_manager_visits amv
JOIN 
  area_manager_sales ams ON amv."area_manager_name" = ams."area_manager_name"
WHERE 
  amv."current_month_visits" > amv."previous_month_visits"
  AND ams."current_month_sales" < ams."previous_month_sales";

agar main 'karachi' area mein 'antibioti:
WITH 
-- Monthly trend of Antibiotics in Karachi for Simulation
antibiotics_karachi AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
  FROM 
    master_sale 
  WHERE 
    product_group_name ILIKE '%Antibiotic%' 
    AND area_name ILIKE '%Karachi%'
  GROUP BY 
    1
),
-- Double visit frequency simulation (2x growth assumption)
simulated_growth AS (
  SELECT 
    month_number,
    total_revenue * 2 AS simulated_revenue
  FROM 
    antibiotics_karachi
),
-- Extrapolate to next quarter
next_quarter_projection AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(simulated_revenue) AS projected_revenue
  FROM 
    simulated_growth
  WHERE 
    month_number >= EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
)
SELECT 
  projected_revenue AS next_quarter_prediction
FROM 
  next_quarter_projection;

thek ha visits double hogy ab mere quart:
WITH visit_summary AS (
  SELECT 
    m.name AS "Manager Name", 
    COUNT(dp.id) AS "Total Visits"
  FROM 
    managers m
  JOIN 
    doctor_plan dp ON m.id = dp."managerId"
  WHERE 
    dp.date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'
  GROUP BY 
    m.name
),
predicted_visits AS (
  SELECT 
    "Manager Name", 
    "Total Visits" * 2 AS "Predicted Visits"
  FROM 
    visit_summary
)
SELECT 
  "Manager Name", 
  "Predicted Visits",
  "Predicted Visits" * 15000 AS "Predicted Sales"  -- Assuming average sale per visit is PKR 15,000
FROM 
  predicted_visits
ORDER BY 
  "Predicted Sales" DESC;
isse hamari current total sales pr kiya:
WITH current_visits AS (
  SELECT 
    "managerId", 
    COUNT("id") AS "Total Visits"
  FROM 
    doctor_plan
  WHERE 
    "date" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'
  GROUP BY 
    "managerId"
),
predicted_visits AS (
  SELECT 
    "managerId", 
    "Total Visits" * 2 AS "Predicted Visits"
  FROM 
    current_visits
),
current_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    "area_manager_name", 
    SUM("total_amount") AS "Total Sales"
  FROM 
    master_sale
  WHERE 
    "invoice_date" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 year'
  GROUP BY 
    "area_manager_name"
),
predicted_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    "area_manager_name", 
    "Total Sales" * 2 AS "Predicted Sales"
  FROM 
    current_sales
)
SELECT 
  cs."area_manager_name", 
  cs."Total Sales", 
  ps."Predicted Sales"
FROM 
  current_sales cs
JOIN 
  predicted_sales ps ON cs."area_manager_name" = ps."area_manager_name"
ORDER BY 
  cs."Total Sales" DESC;

product 3 ka market?:
WITH Internal AS (
  SELECT 
    ib.name AS brick_name, 
    SUM(ms.total_amount) AS internal_sales
  FROM master_sale ms
  JOIN customer_details cd ON ms.customer_id = cd.customer_id
  JOIN ims_brick ib ON cd.ims_brick_id = ib.id
  WHERE ms.product_name = 'Product 3'
  GROUP BY ib.name
),
Market AS (
  SELECT 
    ib.name AS brick_name, 
    SUM(s.unit) AS market_sales
  FROM ims_sale s
  JOIN ims_brick ib ON s."brickId" = ib.id
  WHERE s.product_id IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE name = 'Product 3')
  GROUP BY ib.name
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(i.brick_name, m.brick_name) AS "Brick Name", 
  COALESCE(i.internal_sales, 0) AS "Internal Sales", 
  COALESCE(m.market_sales, 0) AS "Market Sales",
  ROUND(COALESCE(i.internal_sales, 0) / COALESCE(m.market_sales, 1), 4) * 100 AS "Market Share %"
FROM Internal i
FULL OUTER JOIN Market m ON i.brick_name = m.brick_name
ORDER BY "Internal Sales" DESC;
top 10 selling product:
SELECT

  SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM master_sale
GROUP BY product_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

highest selling product ke month wise da:
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month,
  product_name, 
  SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM master_sale
WHERE product_name = (SELECT product_name FROM master_sale GROUP BY product_name ORDER BY SUM(total_amount) DESC LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY month;
which brick has the highest internal uni:
WITH Internal AS (
  SELECT ib.name, SUM(ms.product_quantity) as qty 
  FROM master_sale ms 
  JOIN customer_details cd ON ms.customer_id = cd.customer_id 
  JOIN ims_brick ib ON cd.ims_brick_id = ib.id 
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT name, qty 
FROM Internal 
ORDER BY qty DESC 
LIMIT 1;
